programme.title: Patrick Christys Tonight Replay
programme.desc: Join Patrick for two hours of spirited debate and news making interviews. Top guests tackle the issues that matter, with a sharp take on every story.

programme.title: The Apache war against copper mining: 'this is an act of desecration'
programme.desc: Chí'chil Biłdagoteel - otherwise known as Oak Flat, Arizona – is regarded as sacred ancestral land by the Apache people. With the territory at risk of being sold for copper mining to a subsidiary of Rio Tinto, resident Wendsler Nosie has set up a protest movement from his tipi, alongside his daughter and granddaughter. With no support from the courts, Wendsler and the community are anxiously hoping the Biden administration will pause the land transfer. With religious freedom and environmental protection at risk, they await the call with further news.

programme.title: The secret world of Asian drag queens | Oklahoma rodeo: 'I can be gay and I can be a cowboy'
programme.desc: The secret world of Asian drag queens | Oklahoma rodeo: 'I can be gay and I can be a cowboy'

programme.title: The County
programme.sub-title: what happens after police kill someone you love?
programme.desc: When someone dies after an encounter with law enforcement, he leaves behind parents and children, loss and confusion. What's to be done when those people sworn to protect you are the same people who pull the trigger?

programme.title: My Brother's Keeper
programme.desc: Mohamedou Ould Salahi and one of his former guards, Steve Wood, reunite in Mauritania 13 years after last seeing each other, rekindling an unlikely relationship that profoundly changed their lives. Mohamedou was a prisoner at Guantanamo Bay for 14 years. During his incarceration he was subjected to torture and solitary confinement, but never charged with a crime. His memoir, Guantanamo Diary, became an international bestseller and was adapted into the film, The Mauritanian.

programme.title: From California gang to Mexican vigilante | The final interview with a legendary journalist
programme.desc: From California gang to Mexican vigilante: the family man fighting the drug cartels in Mexico | Murdered in Mexico: the final interview with a legendary journalist

programme.title: Globalised slavery: how big supermarkets are selling prawns in supply chain fed by slave labour
programme.desc: A six-month Guardian multimedia investigation has, for the first time, tracked how some of the world's big-supermakets, Tesco, Aldi, Walmart and Morrisons, are using suppliers relying on slave labour to put cheap prawns on their shelves. Slavery is back and here's the proof. Narrated by Benedict Cumberbatch.

programme.title: He died sitting on our front porch: the fight to stop Chicago's gang killings
programme.desc: Over the Fourth of July weekend, over 100 people were shot in Chicago – a worrying increase after the city's murder rate had fallen to its lowest level in 40 years. Adam Gabbatt visits the city's south side to understand why gang violence remains such a problem – and how grassroots groups are working to prevent it

programme.title: The Circle: masculinity, racism and brotherhood on a Hackney estate
programme.desc: Two brothers living on a council estate in Hackney, east London, express their experiences of masculinity, racism and brotherhood through dance and direct testimony. Revealing interviews are set against dynamic movement sequences, communicating their histories and emotions in a way that words alone could not. This imaginative film explores experiences of anxiety and depression while uncovering love and vulnerability in a close-knit community

programme.title: The only way out is through Jesus: The El Salvador pastors saving MS-13 gang members
programme.desc: In El Salvador, where brutal gangs like MS-13 and 18th Street have given the country the world's highest murder rate, the only way out for members is to become born-again Christians. In this intimate look at the lives of former gang members, we follow two pastors from the rival gangs as they convert gang members to stop them falling back into violent ways

programme.title: Black Sheep
programme.desc: Black Sheep tells the story of Cornelius Walker, whose life changed on 27 November 2000 - the day Damilola Taylor was killed. Damilola was 10, the same age as Cornelius. He lived five minutes away. He had the same skin colour. Cornelius's mother, scared for her son's safety, moved their family out of London. Cornelius suddenly found himself living on a white estate run by racists. But rather than fight them, Cornelius decided to become more like the people who hated him.

programme.title: My Blonde GF: a disturbing story of deepfake pornography
programme.desc: Helen's world is turned upside down when she discovers that her face has been digitally edited on to images of women in sexually explicit and often violent situations. Helen shares the impact this deepfake pornography has had on her life and challenges a culture that treats women's appearance and image as public property while the perpetrators remain anonymous. Deepfake pornography is an increasingly common form of image-based sexual abuse and in June 2023, an amendment of the online safety bill was announced that criminalises the sharing of deepfake intimate images online.

programme.title: Share
programme.desc: Tim Chau is an 18-year-old Asian-American with more than 4m followers on Instagram. He lives online, grabbing his phone first thing in the morning and even taking baths with it sometimes. Although Tim usually shares funny memes, he occasionally posts about mental health. In exploring his reasons for these posts, we discover he has created a different persona online than in real life.

programme.title: The Native American kids who get $200k for graduating
programme.desc: The Ho-Chunk Nation are a Native American tribe that owns a string of casinos across Wisconsin. Ho Chunk children get a share of casino profits once they've graduated and turned 18. It's called their 18 Money. When they finish high school, they get given $200,000. Journalist and film-maker Jenny Kleeman meets the Ho Chunk kids of Black River Falls high school and their families as they graduate, along with tribal representatives and residents of Black River Falls, Wisconsin.

programme.title: The 'Lost Rambos' of Papua New Guinea: how weapons and Hollywood changed tribal disputes
programme.desc: Tribal fighting has long been present in the Papua New Guinea highlands but the influx of modern automatic weaponry in the 1990s turned local disputes into lethal exchanges that threatened to permanently reshape highlands culture. Bootleg copies of the US film Rambo circulated in remote communities, becoming a crude tutorial on the use of such weaponry. The film's influence was so pronounced that the term Rambo is used in Papuan dialects to describe hired mercenaries.

programme.title: The Black Cop: a police officer's story of racism, remorse and resistance
programme.desc: The Black Cop is the winner of the British Short Film category at the 75th British Academy Film Awards. This intimate portrait of Gamal 'G' Turawa, an ex-Metropolitan police officer, explores his memories of racially profiling and harassing black people and homophobia in his early career. Now an openly gay man, Turawa's story is a multi-layered one and sits in the centre of three pivotal moments in recent British history.

programme.title: "I want to bring up a warrior": Ukraine's far-right children's camp
programme.desc: In Ukraine, the far-right Azov militia is fighting on the frontline – and running a summer camp for children. The Guardian visited the camp and followed 16-year-old Anton through his experiences. Is Azov really a modern Hitler Youth organisation, or is it trying to prepare young Ukrainians for the tough reality that awaits them?

programme.title: With Woman: the high stakes for a home-birth midwife in the US
programme.desc: Star is a Black midwife who helps Black women give birth in the comfort of their homes, in the state of Illinois. She is part of a long-established African-American tradition of home-birth midwifery, which is currently in a legal gray area across a number of US states, with midwives unable to obtain a license to practice. Despite this legal peril, and motivated by the high maternal mortality rate for Black women, Star continues in her role. Here we see Star guide Raven, who is expecting her first child, through her last month of pregnancy, from prenatal visits to the intimate experience of giving birth on her kitchen floor.

programme.title: Ill Gotten Gains
programme.desc: We follow Thames Valley Police economic crime unit when they suspect two million pounds has gone missing in a fraud and are after a suspect who may have laundered the cash. We see why a pilot's aircraft is sold off to the highest bidder, but what did he do wrong?

programme.title: Born To Kill?
programme.desc: A profile of one of the most infamous serial killers in modern American history.

programme.title: Deadly Dates
programme.desc: A look at the murder of Nadine Aburas, a woman from Cardiff who was killed by a wealthy businessman she met in 2012 on a popular dating site.

programme.title: Narcos
programme.desc: Peña hatches a plan to try to capture Cali leader Gilberto Rodriguez. Amado proposes a business idea to Pacho.

programme.title: Narcos
programme.desc: Paranoid about leaks, Miguel cracks down on his security. Pacho makes a decision about his new offer. Peña works on cultivating a witness.

programme.title: Narcos
programme.desc: Jorge takes a dangrous risk. An accident in New York threatens to expose Chepe. Peña travels to Curacao to arrest a potential witness.

programme.title: Emperor
programme.desc: As the Japanese surrender at the end of World War II, General Fellers is tasked with deciding if Emperor Hirohito will be hanged as a war criminal. Influencing his ruling is his quest to find Aya, an exchange student he met years earlier in the U.S.

programme.title: Sasha Ellen: When Life Gives You Ellens Make Ellenade
programme.desc: Sasha Ellen asks and then answers the big questions so you don't have to. Is it hard to find love in this modern world? Yes.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek
programme.desc: Turkey Shoot - David goes on a turkey hunt with some townies. Jocelyn takes Moira on a 'relaxing' spa day, while Alexis meets the new love of her life - Ted, the town veterinarian.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek
programme.desc: Allez Vous - Moira and David try to earn money by selling cosmetics to the locals, while Johnny heads to Elmdale in hopes of collecting unemployment insurance.

programme.title: Penn and Teller Fool Us
programme.desc: In this episode Jonathan is tied up in the ‘Tunnel of Love' with a female contestant, whilst Penn & Teller are challenged by a 15 year-old illusionist and a close up expert before going head to head in three challenges.

programme.title: F Is For Family, Season 2
programme.desc: Sue finds that working in the office isn't all she hoped for, while Frank makes a memorable visit to the Unemployment Office. Meanwhile, Kevin enjoys his new space.

programme.title: Workin' Moms
programme.desc: Kate shoots from the hip when Steve suggests a new client. While Forrest is filled with heartache, things heat up between Kate and Mike. Jenny's bends the rules like a boss.

programme.title: Workin' Moms
programme.desc: Kate is hit with a lawsuit while Anne and Lionel struggle to keep up with Alice's exploits. Frankie feels the weight of being in love with a religious woman.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek
programme.desc: Lawn Signs - Moira's campaign takes a turn when some of her lawn signs mysteriously disappear. David and Alexis must work together to get David's boss out of legal trouble.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek
programme.desc: Happy Anniversary - Johnny and Moira go out for their anniversary and run into a couple they knew from their former life, while Alexis and David attend Mutt's annual barn party, making up with some friends, and making out with others.

programme.title: Spy
programme.desc: Tim's got a lot on his plate this week, thanks to a homeless Eastern European man and a social worker named Paula, who happens to be absolutely bonkers

programme.title: Children Ruin Everything
programme.desc: When an unexpected expense puts Astrid (Meaghan Rath) and James (Aaron Abrams) over their monthly budget, they must attempt to tighten their belts while still trying to keep a promise to their kids.

programme.title: Helen Bauer: Little Miss Baby Angel Face
programme.desc: Helen Bauer enjoys a drama. She is her mother's daughter, taking a small situation, blowing it up and then getting upset that it's out of her control. At the same time she dreams of being a sweet angel who handles any drama with grace.

programme.title: The Mafia With Trevor McDonald
programme.desc: For the first time on British television, Trevor McDonald takes viewers on an immersive journey into the American Mafia gaining close access to people who have experienced firsthand the money, glamour and violence of the United States' most famous organised crime network. Travelling to cities across the United States, Trevor gets inside the lives of people on all sides of the Mafia story, many of whom have never spoken on television before. From ‘made' men who have risen to the heights of power to ruthless killers who have pulled the trigger on the orders of their bosses, Trevor meets men – and their families – who today live in shadow of their time in the Mob.

programme.title: British Gangsters
programme.desc: Bernard O'Mahoney introduces himself and gives a brief description of his past which led him to becoming acquainted with the UK's most infamous "faces."

programme.title: The Fall
programme.desc: The Fall continues. As Spector's health stabilizes his legal team lead by Sean Healy [Aidan McCardle] move into action determined he'll never stand trial. Detective Superintendent Stella Gibson [Gillian Anderson] discovers evidence that there may be more victims.

programme.title: Narcos
programme.desc: The hunt for Pablo seems to be over after he makes a deal with the government, but Murphy and Peña - and the Cali Cartel - have other plans.

programme.title: Inside the Mind
programme.desc: Children go missing from a small community in New Delhi. They disappear at a rate of one every month for nearly two years. Parents fear their children have been snatched to service the organ transplant trade - or worse, the child sex trade.

programme.title: Ill Gotten Gains
programme.desc: Today police in Merseyside execute multiple raids on properties across the Liverpool area searching for Ill Gotten Gains. We find out about the crime that lead a sailing yacht being sold off at a proceeds of crime auction.

programme.title: Deadly Dates
programme.desc: When 62-year-old Lorraine Long from Arizona ended a relationship with a man she had met on an online dating website, he shot her dead in a fit of jealous rage.

programme.title: Accused
programme.desc: As Liam walks to the dock to hear his fate he feels the depth of hatred and heart break directed right at him from his loved ones as they look on. programme.title: Alien Files Unsealed
programme.desc: Investigate released documents regarding alien and UFO encounters, made accessible to the public in 2011 by the Freedom of Information Act. We investigate mass UFO sightings, personal abductions, government cover-ups and breaking alien news from around the world. We delve into the "photoshopping" of space, the value of Wikileaks, and the role social media plays in alien stories.

programme.title: Conspiracy Files Unsealed
programme.desc: Conspiracy Files examines a conspiracy that may be seeking to eradicate 90% of the world's population. It looks at the Georgia Guidestones built by an unknown architect which call for humanity to reduce its population to below 500 million.

programme.title: Conspiracy Files Unsealed
programme.desc: Conspiracy Files examines whether the United State military has constructed flying saucers. It looks at unclassified documents describing Project 1794 and a supersonic large disk fighter aircraft. These plans are later developed by a Canadian company Avro Aircraft into the Avrocar.

programme.title: Conspiracy Files Unsealed
programme.desc: Conspiracy files examines whether the Plum Island Animal Research Center is responsible for a number of unusual creatures washing up on beaches of the east coast. It also discuss former the facility's connection to former Nazi scientists and possible CDC connection to plague outbreaks in the United States.

programme.title: Conspiracy Files Unsealed
programme.desc: Conspiracy Files counts down the top ten secret societies: (10) The Hellfire Club, (9) The Majestic Twelve, (8) The Knights of the Golden Circle, (7) Opus Dei, (6) The Bohemian Club, (5) Skull and Bones, (4) The Bilderberg Group, (3) The Knights Templar, (2) The Freemasons, and (1) The Illuminati.

programme.title: House In Between
programme.desc: A beautiful documentary telling the real story of a homeowner, and the team looking for answers that will move Alice back into her house.

programme.title: UFOs: Declassified
programme.desc: In 1942 Los Angeles was rocked by a mysterious air raid. What flew over LA that night and how did it evade dozens of anti-aircraft battalions? Also, why are UFOs so often seen over nearby Edwards AFB?

programme.title: UFOs: Declassified
programme.desc: During the Cold War, sinister objects were seen flying above secret military bases. Were aliens monitoring the world's nuclear arsenal?

programme.title: UFOs: Declassified
programme.desc: Are we alone in the universe? In the 80s and 90s, sightings of dark, triangular flying objects began to occur across the world - many incidents remaining unexplained.

programme.title: Who Wants to Be a Millionaire?
programme.desc: Former `Top Gear' presenter and opinionated `The Sunday Times' and `The Sun' columnist Jeremy Clarkson presents the rebooted version of `Who Wants to Be a Millionaire?', the 12-question quiz with a £1,000,000 prize. Each contestant can use three traditional lifelines: 50-50 which removes half of the answers, Ask the Audience which polls the studio audience for their answer, and Phone a Friend, wherein the contestant can call a friend for 30 seconds to ask for their advice. However, there is now a fourth lifeline: Ask the Host, where the contestant can ask Clarkson if he knows the answer to the question, and there is also a new second `safety net', previously set at £32,000, which is now able to be set by the contestant themselves. Also, contestants must first win their chance to play the quiz by winning the Fastest Fingers First round, competing against other potential players to be the quickest to answer a question with sequenced answers.

programme.title: Am I Perfect?
programme.desc: The dietician is not happy with Maddy continuing with the calorie restrictions she does by no means endorse it. Maddy sheepishly ignores her comments continuing to eat less on the Alkaline Diet, meanwhile clutching onto the pole for sheer life in her first ever round of Pole Dancing. She ends the week feeling nauseous after undergoing a colonic irrigation. Maddy moves into Week 9 with the famous Lemon Detox diet. We watch Maddy get her signature freckles removed and despite pushing through intensive obstacle courses she is absolutely heartbroken when she finds out that she has actually gained weight this week.

programme.title: Am I Perfect?
programme.desc: It is the Final Week and the lead up to the Big Finale – Maddy has become a completely different person and is upset at becoming a person she doesn't like. She is desperate to reach her goal and continue losing more weight. To help the process Maddy continues ditching food on the Lemon Detox Diet, along with suffering immense pain submerged in an Ice Bath. Maddy starts to crack mentally. In her final visit to the nurse she discovers she is still considered overweight despite feeling like a shell of her former self. In the lead up to the reveal, Maddy gets a complete beauty makeover however, before she presents herself the pressure becomes too much and Maddy has an anxiety attack.

programme.title: Foodwise
programme.desc: Welcome to Chongqing, China's largest city. Located in the country's southwest, it straddles two mighty rivers and is famed for its extraordinary skyline, with high-rises mushrooming out of the hills and vertigo-inducing bridges.

programme.title: Foodwise
programme.desc: Beijing is a 3000-year old metropolis home to a dizzying array of culinary traditions, not least of which is vegetarian cuisine. For Beijingers, eating vegetarian is the best way to welcome spring. Today, Tianran and Angela take up the challenge.

programme.title: Foodwise
programme.sub-title: Great Walls of Beijing" Great Walls of Beijing
programme.desc: From feasts of tofu made using well-water and fish caught fresh from the reservoir, to bubbling cauldrons of thinly-sliced lamb, the hilly suburbs of Beijing are home to some of the best-loved weekend escapes, and they're all by the Great Wall.

programme.title: Love On The Rocks
programme.desc: Jason has attempted to climb the Grand Teton, located in Wyoming, three times before the couple's adventure out west. Will the fourth time be a charm, or will life's unplanned moments present even greater challenges than Jason anticipated?

programme.title: Love On The Rocks
programme.desc: After climbing the Grand Teton, the couple head to Utah where a change of plans has them trading in their climbing shoes for an ATV. They take on Hells Revenge, a 4x4 trail only recommended for extremely experienced drivers...which they are not.

programme.title: Love On The Rocks
programme.sub-title: Deserts and Mountain Lions. Oh My!" Deserts and Mountain Lions. Oh My!
programme.desc: Hiking and canyoneering are a nice break from strenuous mountaineering, but it's hard to relax when a lack of water and mountain lions are part of the equation. Tayler and Jason both need a break...but is the break they need actually from each other?

programme.title: Love On The Rocks
programme.desc: Tayler and Jason reconnect during a romantic stay in Lake Tahoe, but Jason struggles keeping his cool while off roading the Rubicon Trail. Are Jason's high expectations too? And will these expectations shut them down on their next climb, Mt Whitney?

Into America's Wild is a non-stop ride via kayak, train, bike, hot air balloon and more that explores the transformational allure of wild places and the human connection we all share with the natural world.

programme.title: Ellis Family Vacation: Washington D.C.
programme.desc: The Ellis Family explores Washington D.C., discovering monuments, Ford's Theatre, and the best cupcakes in the capital!

programme.title: Ben & Jerry's Flavor Graveyard
programme.sub-title: Mermaid Show - Cog Railray - Sneaker Convention - Bug Art Collection
programme.desc: Will finds himself in the middle of an ice cream catastrophe at Ben & Jerry's Factory in Waterbury, Vermont mingles with mermaids at the underwater show in Weeki Wachee, Florida achieves speeds of 5 miles per hour on the cog wheel train to the summit of Mt. Washington, New Hampshire buys new kicks at a Sneaker convention in Cleveland and marvels at Bug Art portraits at a museum in St. Johnsbury, Vermont.

programme.title: Gatorland
programme.sub-title: Muhammad Ali Collection - West Virginia State Penitentiary - Randyland
programme.desc: Will tries and fails to ride an alligator at Orlando's Gatorland drops in on the only used car dealership with a priceless collection of Muhammad Ali memorabilia in New Hampshire dabbles in the paranormal at the abandoned and haunted West Virginia State Penitentiary and then meets an outrageous artist who is creating a psychedelic city block in Pittsburgh known as “Randyland.”

programme.title: Golf Ball Diving
programme.sub-title: Haskell Free Library - Palace of Gold - African-American Heritage Museum - Smog Museum
programme.desc: Will learns the hazards and rewards of professional Golf Ball Diving in Kissimmee, Florida considers defecting to a foreign country at a library that sits smack dab on the Vermont – Canadian border discovers a Hari Krishna commune with an incredible “Palace of Gold” in the hills of West Virginia marvels at outdoor sculptures at the African-American Heritage Museum in Hammond, Louisiana, and catches his breath in Donora, Pennsylvania at the world's only “Smog Museum.”

programme.title: Pierogi Fest
programme.sub-title: Lambert's Café - Bird Cage Theater - National Wildlife Property Repository - Unicycle Football
programme.desc: Will meets Mr. Pierogi, Ms. Pasczki and the polka-loving Pierorgettes at Pierogi Fest in Whiting, Indiana ducks for cover at Lambert's Café in Alabama discovers where the bullets are buried in Tombstone Arizona's Bird Cage theater is shocked by the products made from endangered animals confiscated by the National Wildlife Property Repository near Denver and cheers on the daring (and possibly deranged) participants at a Unicycle Football game in San Marcos, Texas.

programme.title: Q: Alabama's Barbecue Legends
programme.desc: The story of Alabama barbecue can't be told in sentences. It's told through whiffs of smoke, buckets of sauce and friendly nods across the counter. See how a simple dish has become a culinary anthem for Alabama.

programme.title: Tying the Knot at 13,000 Feet
programme.desc: A romantic trip to Colorado takes a windy turn when Jason pushes Tayler, despite her hesitation, to summit Mt. Democrat in 70 mph winds and -19 degree weather.

programme.title: A Newly-Wed Recipe for Disaster
programme.desc: Jason loves mountain biking. Tayler prefers to read a book. Jason is up for any adventure tossed at him. Tayler likes to be a bit more prepared. Will the adventures that await in Arkansas leave the couple questioning if they have anything in common?

programme.title: Theodora's Room
programme.desc: Tayler and Jason travel to Eureka Springs, Arkansas, a town with a rich history and home to one of the most haunted hotels in America, The Crescent. Jason convinces Tayler to stay one night, but will that stay lead to a night they don't want to remember?

programme.title: Hope For Wildlife
programme.desc: Welcome the arrival of a black bear whose rehab plan is tied up in red tape.

programme.title: The Bizarre Pet Vets
programme.desc: View an epic lizard manicure, a snake ultrasound, and an echidna escape attempt.

programme.title: The Big Feed
programme.desc: Meet a giant panda family that poses a unique nutritional challenge to staff.

programme.title: The Big Feed
programme.desc: Follow the feeding staff for a day at the Smithsonian National Zoo.

programme.title: The Big Feed
programme.desc: Get a behind-the-scenes look at North America's largest zoo kitchen.

programme.title: The Big Feed
programme.desc: Explore the demanding agricultural operations at the Smithsonian National Zoo.

programme.title: Hope For Wildlife
programme.desc: Hope's busy season arrives early. Two patients from last year are released.

programme.title: Work on the Wild Side
programme.desc: Focus on a badly hurt elephant, soothe jumpy antelopes, and ponder rhino bonds.

programme.title: The Life Of The Queen Mother
programme.desc: This remarkable portrait digs beneath the surface and presents a balanced account of the life of a powerful and exceptional woman.

programme.title: Princess Diana's Legacy: Prince William and Prince Harry
programme.desc: Examining the legacy that Diana, Princess of Wales left behind after her tragic death – for her children, for the institution of the monarchy and for the admiring public.

programme.title: Bhutan
programme.desc: Bhutan's governing party pledged recently to follow the policies of the absolute monarchy it is replacing, after it won a landslide in the country's first parliamentary elections. This remote, beautiful country truly is in the throes of a noble experiment. What makes this experiment unique is that this move towards democracy has been initiated by the ruling monarch himself.

programme.title: After Elizabeth II: The Monarchy in Peril?
programme.desc: A new sovereign can revive a royal family or be its kiss of death. So will the controversial successor to Queen Elizabeth II spell the end of Britain's thousand-year monarchy? This film looks at the shaky future of the House of Windsor, once the beloved Queen passes the crown to her son Charles.

programme.title: Japan's Royal Hereditary System
programme.desc: The Japanese Imperial family is the oldest hereditary monarchy in the world, dating back to the sixth century BC. However, its central role in Japan has not shielded the family from controversy in recent years. Through personal scandals, and vagaries of the hereditary system, even to their own biology, it's been a rocky time. But what is left if every tradition is changeable?

programme.title: Princess Camilla: Winner Takes All
programme.desc: She was the devoted royal mistress and the notorious 'third person' in Prince Charles's troubled and tragic marriage to Diana, Princess of Wales...

programme.title: FashionTV Global
programme.desc: FashionTV L'Original

programme.title: FashionTV Global
programme.desc: FashionTV L'Original

programme.title: Save That Tree
programme.desc: Bean is showing Irma his favourite tree when he discovers a tree surgeon getting ready to cut it down.

programme.title: Bean Encore
programme.desc: The Great Eduardo, violinist supreme, is in town and Irma wants to go to the concert.

programme.title: A Grand Invitation
programme.desc: Mr Bean is all at sea with the landed gentry.

programme.title: Wrestle Bean
programme.desc: Mr. Bean is trying to read a book but he is disturbed by the noise of Mrs. Wicket and her friend.

programme.title: Mobile Home
programme.desc: Miss Wince takes Mrs. Wicket off on holiday in her brand-new, swanky caravan and Bean is left behind.

programme.title: A Ray of Sunshine
programme.desc: Sunbathing proves a more strenuous pursuit for Mr Bean.

programme.title: Cat Chaos
programme.desc: Mrs. Wicket becomes annoyingly inconsolable when Scrapper goes missing.

programme.title: Scrapper Cleans Up
programme.desc: Irma wants a romantic break Bean doesn't. It's too expensive.

programme.title: Haircut
programme.desc: Mr Bean has a bad hair day.

programme.title: Pizza Bean
programme.desc: Mr. Bean orders a takeaway pizza, but when it arrives, he feels let down by the size of it.

programme.title: Game Over
programme.desc: Mr. Bean becomes obsessed with gaming after being introduced by Mrs. Wicket's nephew.

programme.title: Spa Day
programme.desc: Mrs. Wicket demands that Bean drives her and Miss Wince to their booked spa retreat.

programme.title: Camping
programme.desc: Mr Bean discovers the great outdoors is not always so great.

programme.title: Restaurant
programme.desc: Mr Bean makes a meal out of his Birthday celebration.

programme.title: A New Friend
programme.desc: A small bird wants to befriend Mr. Bean, but its squawking sound annoys Mrs. Wicket.

programme.title: The Photograph
programme.desc: The airport personnel refuses to let Mr. Bean take a flight due to his passport having no photo.

programme.title: Spring Clean
programme.desc: Mr Bean finds that cleanliness can be a filthy business.

programme.title: Bean At The Museum
programme.desc: Mr. Bean thinks he's just dug up a valuable coin in the back-garden.

programme.title: Jurassic Bean
programme.desc: While Mr. Bean is taking photos of wildlife, he sees big footprints belonging to a dinosaur.

programme.title: Trophy Bean
programme.desc: Mrs. Wicket's Nephew is staying with her when he wins two tickets to an Outward Bound course.

programme.title: Royal Bean
programme.desc: During a visit to Buckingham Palace, Mr Bean meets the lady of the house.

programme.title: Dinner For Two
programme.desc: When invited to dinner by Mr Bean, it's probably best to take your own sandwiches.

programme.title: Where Did You Get That Cat?
programme.desc: Mrs. Wicket has a new hat that looks like Scrapper.

programme.title: The Cruise
programme.desc: Mr. Bean wins two tickets for an exotic cruise and takes Teddy along for the trip of a lifetime.

programme.title: In The Wild
programme.desc: Mr. Bean decides to become a wildlife photographer.

programme.title: Double Trouble
programme.desc: Mr Bean meets a soul mate.

programme.title: Ball Pool
programme.desc: Mr. Bean wants to play inside the local play area, but he is not allowed to enter.

programme.title: Rare Bird
programme.desc: Mr. Bean loves bird spotting and is desperate to tick off the last elusive bird in his book.

programme.title: Birthday Bother
programme.desc: It's Irma's birthday. Bean buys a bargain-bin load of cards, and writes out two –one nice, one silly.

programme.title: Weekend At Halberts
programme.desc: Party time in Knighton! The mood is down so the King decides to throw a party. In the meantime Jestro attacks the Fortrex, but he is confronted with the new NEXO Power "The Wedgie of Doom". Clay is turned to stone and everyone is gloomy. Especially King Halbert. In order to get everything in a better mood Aaron organizes a celebration. The King wants a reenactment of Clay's heroic rescue of the Queen. He is (as usual) totally unaware of Clay's situation. In order not to disappoint him further, the Knights get a remote control for Clay's Battle suit and is thus able to “perform” as Clay. Lance is happy to exercise his acting abilities and quickly gets into the role of the uptight knight of knights. Ava is working on reinstalling Merlok 2.0 into the Fortrex with Robin. She is also preparing the Fortrex for a visit from the new Knights' Academy novices. It is a fieldtrip with Principal Brickland and Sir Griffiths with the goal of teaching the kids about these new so-called High-tech battle strategies. Not really feeling it for anything modern, it quickly turns into a regular trip back memory lane for Brickland and Sir Griffiths. This out of control excursion is an excellent moment for Jestro who is looking for an opportunity to cheer up the defeated Monstrox. Unfortunately, for Jestro, Ava is able to make Merlok 2.0 functional again, and the Novices are able to fight Jestro and his monsters off using the NEXO Power: Wedgie of Doom. It is a humiliating defeat. Apparently, this is just what the doctor ordered for Monstrox. A good laugh at someone else's expense. His evil mood is back on.

programme.title: Awakening
programme.desc: When Mateo's comic creation, Z-Blob, follows him from a dream back to Brooklyn, Mateo and his sister realize the Dream World is real, and in danger!

programme.title: Dream Chasers
programme.desc: After a daring mission to save their friend in the Dream World, Mateo and Izzie find the nightmare has followed them back to the Waking World.

programme.title: Legacy, Vehicle and Mechs
programme.desc: Zane takes help from Nya for backup memories of their adventures to the Samurai X Cave computer, but Zane encounters a mysterious puzzle buried deep within his code. Nya digitizes Jay and uploads him into Zane's mind. Jay reviews memories of the Ninja's various motorcycles, mechs and planes in order to solve the vehicle-themed puzzle.

programme.title: The Oni And The Dragon
programme.desc: While Princess Harumi learns to adjust to the life of a Ninja, Lloyd and Jay search for answers about the Oni Masks at Mystake's Tea house, while Cole and Zane attempt to infiltrate the Sons of Garmadon biker gang. Remembering that Lloyd managed to arrest one of the gang members at Borg Tower, the Ninja decide to interrogate him to ascertain the location of the third Oni Mask. In order to get him to talk, however, Cole suggests they visit MYSTAKE'S TEA HOUSE to obtain some "truth tea." The truth-tea backfires spectacularly when Cole accidentally switches cups and drinks the tea himself. Zane is able to salvage the situation, however, and obtains a lead. He learns that the Sons of Garmadon frequent a karaoke bar called LAUGHY'S. Zane and Cole don disguises to infiltrate the bar. Cole assumes the alter ego “Rocky Dangerbuff," while Zane adopts the subtler moniker "Snake Jaguar." In order to earn the gang's trust, Cole performs a karaoke routine that is a smash success. Unfortunately, during the routine, his disguise comes loose and he is exposed as a ninja. The Sons of Garmadon attack him, and Zane (who is still in disguise) is unable to intervene. Cole is taken prisoner while Zane is invited back to the Sons of Garmadon's secret base.

programme.title: The Pranks
programme.desc: The friends are using their talents to pull a prank on Olivia. But who gets the last laugh?Stephanie finds the perfect front page story for the school paper! It's almost too good to be true. Emma and Andrea go undercover to solve the mystery of the two Jacobs.

programme.title: Spooky Sensation
programme.desc: The girls decided to spend a weekend at the hotel. It appears to be haunted. Watch the full video to know more about this.

programme.title: Sings of Love
programme.desc: See how Stephanie and Olivia enter the Under the Sea photo competition. Jacob wrote a love song! Olivia and her friends are very excited to hear. Tanya and Stephanie are teamed up in baking class. Watch the video for more fun.

programme.title: Video Wonder
programme.desc: Olivia and Andrea visited science camp with Mrs Stevens. On the other hand, Andrea and Mia decides to return a lost skunk to nature. Andrea was reading intimate postcards between Chef Pierre and Mrs. Stevens.

programme.title: Stiix and Stones
programme.desc: The Ninja travel to the Village of Stiix to find the thief who stole the scroll of Airjitzu, but the self-serving Ronan isn't keen to sell it cheaply so the Ninja must figure out a way to make money on the docks – and when they fail to make enough cash, the Ninja decide to steal it – but have a run in with Moro and Sowlarcha. The Ninja travel to the Village of Stiix to find the thief who stole the scroll of Airjitzu, but when the self-serving Ronan isn't keen to sell it cheaply, the Ninja must figure out a way to make money on the docks. Meanwhile, reluctant to give up being Samurai X, Nya struggles to embrace being a Water Ninja, and Sensei Wu gives her a riddle to figure out. Back at Stiix, when the Ninja fail to make enough cash working the docks, the Ninja decide to steal it... but have a run in with Moro and Sowlarcha. After Moro gets away with the scroll, the Ninja are left dangling, but Ronan saves them at a price – for a piece of their share in the Tea Farm.

programme.title: Public Enemy Number One
programme.desc: The Ninja must find out as much as they can about Nadakhan before he finds the Realm Crystal to save his crew, but after the Ninja are labeled enemies by the world they used to protect, our heroes find themselves hunted by their old friend, Ronan. With the Destiny's Bounty impounded, the police hire Ronin to track down the fugitive ninja. Misako has been arrested and is confronted by Nadakhan, who reveals he has trapped Wu in the Teapot of Tyrahn. Misako accidentally reveals the location of the Realm Crystal. The ninja discover that Wu was researching djinn when he disappeared and split up to learn more about their potential new foe. Lloyd and Zane head to the Library of Domu. While there, Ronin hacks into Zane's systems and shuts him down, then captures Lloyd. Ronin uses Zane's SOS beacon to lure Kai and Nya into the desert, where they are captured. Later, Cole and Jay are defeated by Ronin as well. Meanwhile, Nadakhan has used his powers to foil the high-tech security guarding the Realm Crystal and steals it. The ninja are hauled off to Kryptarium Prison and Nadakhan is free to gather his lost crew.

programme.title: Enkrypted
programme.desc: Falsely imprisoned, the Ninja are at their lowest point, but find an unlikely friend in an old enemy. Meanwhile, Nadakhan rescues his marooned crew and gains a new perspective, along with a new mysterious plan. With the ninja imprisoned, Nadakhan uses the Realm Crystal to free his old crew. The ninja encounter Captain Soto, the first captain of the Destiny's Bounty, who tells them the story of how he originally trapped Nadakhan in the Teapot.The secret, he says, is the venom of a Tiger Widow, a rare creature that lives on only one island. The venom can slow a djinn down. Soto is the only one who knows where the island is and will only tell if the ninja break him out of jail. Meanwhile, Nadakhan has decided to return to his home realm of Djinjago, only to discover it is falling apart. The ninja's destruction of the Cursed Realm is affecting the realms connected to it. Nadakhan uses the Djinn Blade to smash the Teapot, absorbing all the spirits that were trapped there into the sword.Nadakhan vows revenge on the ninja and NINJAGO. The ninja and Soto escape from jail, only to find out the map to the island is on Nadakhan's ship. Nadakhan discovers that Nya looks just like Delara, his long-lost love.

programme.title: Misfortune Rising
programme.desc: The Ninja are on a collision course to find the map to stop Nadakhan, they first must find him. Meanwhile, Jay makes a wish to change his future, but it could alter his past indefinitely. The ninja's search for Nadakhan's ship turns up nothing. Nadakhan's crew is struggling to handle an airship which used to sail only on the oceans. Nadakhan confronts Jay and talks him into making a wish that will win him Nya. Jay wishes that he wasn't born in a junkyard and was rich. The next moment, he receives a letter saying his father has died and he has inherited his estate. Jay rushes home to find his parents in the junkyard and finds out they are fine, but they reveal that he is adopted. Jay discovers that his real father is the actor who played his favorite movie hero. In an effort to trap the ninja, the Sky Pirates start raids all over NINJAGO City. Nadakhan kidnaps Kai, who makes two wishes, both of which go wrong. His third wish is to “make it all go away.” Nadakhan's first mate, Flintlocke, accidentally destroys the Realm Crystal and Cole steals Soto's map. The Destiny's Bounty mysteriously vanishes from the police impound yard.

programme.title: The Cloud
programme.desc: A storm is brewing over Knighton. Monstrox has taken the form of a cloud, and is raising an army of lightning infused Stone Monsters. His first target is the new Lavalands Amusement Park. Harmony reigns in Knighton as the Knights pursue their civilian lives: Lance has a TV talk show Axl is the singing chef on the show Jestro is the weatherman Clay is teaching at the Knights' Academy Macy, Ava and Merlok 2.0 travel the land in the Fortrex making sure the kingdom's defenses are ready (part of a plan she and Clay have) Aaron and his hover shield is travelling the land setting extreme records. Robin is at his workshop at the Knights' Academy doing an “independent study” – he's working on some top secret project for Merlok 2.0. It all seems excellent! We even see the Knights new vehicles – which have been optimized for civilian life (except for Clay's.) But storm clouds are brewing. Well, one storm cloud is brewing: the Cloud of Monstrox! Yes, the Book of Monsters has reconstituted himself and is now a cloud who needs a man on the ground to enact his new evil plan. He follows his old buddy Jestro as he goes across the realm on the weekends apologizing for being evil. ZAP! With one bolt of his evil magic lighting, the Cloud of Monstrox turns Jestro evil again (only this time a bit, well, too evil.) The evil duo are back together – and bring stone to life for the first time in the form of Gargoyles from the town of GHOULIA. Now they must gather the Forbidden Powers so that the Cloud of Monstrox can destroy the entire kingdom! A battle breaks out in the Lava Lands, where Lance and Alice Squires are reporting from the opening of the Cuthbert Richmond funded Lava Lands Amusement Park, rebuilt from the remains of Jestro's old HQ. Jestro and the Cloud are after something in the remains and as Merlok 2.0 sends out a call for the Knights to help Lance. Can Lance (with an assist from King Halbert in his Mech) hold-off Jestro, the Cloud and their new army of stone fighters?!

programme.title: A Little Rusty
programme.desc: The Cloud of Monstrox and Jestro unlocks a mysterious Forbidden Power. What kind ofhavoc will they unleash? And can Merlok 2.0 and the NEXO KNIGHTS make the new COMBO NEXO Powers work? The Knights finally make it to the Lava Lands – using their various new forms of transport, which are all strictly civilian vechicles – and they must regroup and learn to fight together again to face the new threat of Jestro, the Cloud of Monstrox, and their STONE MONSTERS (in this case, Stone Gargoyles.) But Jestro and his monsters beat back the knights and recover the STAFF OF MONSTROX – which was buried under the ceremonial chamber from Episode 210 (and is now the Lava Puker amusement park ride) – and they get away on Jestro's EVIL MOBILE, which he recovers from the HQ garage. Macy says this is exactly why she's been touring the kingdom preparing everyone for the next attack. The Knights have to get it together because now the entire kingdom is under threat…again. Robin decides he must upgrade the Knights' vehicles and make them more “fight optimized.” Ava and Merlok 2.0 must figure out how to use new NEXO Powers because regular NEXO Powers do make Stone monsters back into stone, but the Cloud simply zaps them to life again. Meanwhile, in the IRON MOUNTAINS, Jestro and the Cloud of Monstrox find the first of the Forbidden Powers: RELENTLESS RUST. They find the ROGUL STATUE holding the power and zap him to life. Now…they can rust those shiny knights to pieces! Ava and Merlok are attempting to use NEXO COMBO POWERS – with hilarious results – as they try to figure out how they might work. When Jestro attacks, he's able to halt the Fortrex by instantly rusting its tracks and wheels! Robin has his hands full trying to clean all the rust from the attack of Relentless Rust. As the Knights attempt to defend against Jestro, the Cloud is zapping statues to life. He hits a statue with a bolt of lightning as Clay is touching it. Something happens…Clay feels odd stiff as if rock is mixing with his body. Finally, Ava and Merlok 2.0 download to the Knights their new thing: a COMBO NEXO COMBO Power. It works! It can smash the animated statues to dust! They use it to defeat Jestro, but he and the Cloud get away with the Forbidden Power of Relentless Rust. Victory … sort of. Clay talks to Merlok 2.0…something has happened to him. What can they do? Merlok 2.0 is very concerned.

programme.title: Thunderstox
programme.desc: Jestro and the Cloud of Monstrox encounters the sculptor. He helps unleash a horde of fierce garden gnomes on Knighton. What will the NEXO KNIGHTS do against this new enemy? Will their new COMBO NEXO Powers do the trick? As Jestro and the Cloud of Monstrox head off on the Evil Mobile to 'store' the Forbidden Power in a secret location, they encounter…THE SCULPTOR. His real name is ROBERTO ARNOLDI. He's a sensitive and odd artist who has been laid off by the king (the King ordered a "smashing" statue of the Queen, and the Sculptor made a statue of the Queen literally smashing monsters. He takes everything very literally.) Jestro instructs him to make a "bad" statue that he can use to attack the knights. The Sculptor sets to work. Meanwhile, the NEXO KNIGHTS are discussing the COMBO NEXO Powers, the Forbidden Powers, and what all this means. Lance, meanwhile, decides that since his talk show career is on hold, he thinks he'll install cameras in the Fortrex and do a Big Brother-like expose show on the Knights (he decides NOT to tell the others.) Merlok 2.0 and the Cloud of Monstrox (each talking to their cohorts) explain the history of the Forbidden Powers: it's a history lesson about the WIZARDS' COUNCIL, the Forbidden Powers, and how they were stopped long ago. This visual montage leads Jestro to…MOUNT THUNDERSTROX. The Cloud of Monstrox shows him the circle of ten Standing Stones where he will insert the Forbidden Powers. "What'll happen after that?” asks Jestro, curious. "Oh, I don't want to spoil the surprise," says the Cloud. They insert the first Forbidden Power, Relentless Rust, and it locks into place on its stone. They go off to battle the Knights and collect the "bad" statue the sculptor is making. But he's made a literally bad statue…it's terrible ... garden gnomes. Like an amateur art student. And…it's not even finished. ("You can't rush bad genius!") The Knights attack with their newly modified vehicles and they succeed in destroying the Evil Mobile. They then try to use a COMBO NEXO Power, but can't…it had to be perfect to work (Ava and Merlok need to work on it.) As Jestro and the Cloud retreat, Merlok again talks to Clay about turning to stone! Merlok calls in Robin…he will need him to build something to help Clay as he becomes more and more impaired.

programme.title: Weekend At Halberts
programme.desc: Party time in Knighton! The mood is down so the King decides to throw a party. In the meantime Jestro attacks the Fortrex, but he is confronted with the new NEXO Power "The Wedgie of Doom". Clay is turned to stone and everyone is gloomy. Especially King Halbert. In order to get everything in a better mood Aaron organizes a celebration. The King wants a reenactment of Clay's heroic rescue of the Queen. He is (as usual) totally unaware of Clay's situation. In order not to disappoint him further, the Knights get a remote control for Clay's Battle suit and is thus able to “perform” as Clay. Lance is happy to exercise his acting abilities and quickly gets into the role of the uptight knight of knights. Ava is working on reinstalling Merlok 2.0 into the Fortrex with Robin. She is also preparing the Fortrex for a visit from the new Knights' Academy novices. It is a fieldtrip with Principal Brickland and Sir Griffiths with the goal of teaching the kids about these new so-called High-tech battle strategies. Not really feeling it for anything modern, it quickly turns into a regular trip back memory lane for Brickland and Sir Griffiths. This out of control excursion is an excellent moment for Jestro who is looking for an opportunity to cheer up the defeated Monstrox. Unfortunately, for Jestro, Ava is able to make Merlok 2.0 functional again, and the Novices are able to fight Jestro and his monsters off using the NEXO Power: Wedgie of Doom. It is a humiliating defeat. Apparently, this is just what the doctor ordered for Monstrox. A good laugh at someone else's expense. His evil mood is back on.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: The AllSpark creates a new Autobot out of pieces of garbage.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: The Dinobots, Predacons, and Terrorcons suddenly desert their fellow Transformers.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: The Decepticons steal the Autobot Matrix of Leadership.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: The Quintessons locked the planet Zamojin in a space-warp and isolated it from the rest of the universe.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.sub-title: Return of the Optimus Prime, Part 1
programme.desc: Scientists infects Autobots and Decepticons with a plague that will pit them against their own kind.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: The race for the Omega Keys grows more desperate.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: When the Decepticons take him captive, Smokescreen learns of the location of thefinal Omega Key.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Starscream proposes a truce to Megatron, but Dreadwing threatens to stand in the way of his return.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: The Autobots find a weak spot in Unicron's armor.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: The Ice planet was destroyed by Unicron.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Unicron dies but Megatron survives with Unicron's mind living inside him.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Bumblebee competes against the Decepticons in an underground racing competition.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: When the AllSpark turns construction vehicles into Autobots, Bulkhead becomes fast friends.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Prowl goes after Starscream when he escapes from the custody of the Elite Guard.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.sub-title: Return of the Optimus Prime, Part 2
programme.desc: The hate plague rapidly spreads among robots and humans on Earth.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Smurfette's Rose: Smurfette promises Mother Nature that if she creates a blue rose Smurfette will never cut it. But when the white rose becomes blue, Smurfette becomes white. The only way to make Smurfette blue again is for her to cut the rose. She reluctantly cuts the rose, returning nature to normalcy and learning that one cannot always keep a promise.

programme.title: A Bell For Azrael
programme.desc: Gargamel puts a spell on a bell attached to Azrael's tail that will lead the cat to the Smurfs. Papa Smurf outwits him with a counter-spell that leads the wizard to Big Mouth instead of the tasty Smurfs.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Jokey's Cloak: What is in the box that's been found by Jokey Smurf? A cloak belonging to Wizlow the Magician gnome. And what sort of cloak? Jokey learns that it's a cloak of invisibility. Whoever wears it has a great opportunity of playing practical jokes... And guess what havoc an invisible Jokey is able to wreak on the Village. Yet if Wizlow parted with the cloak, there must be a reason...

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Love Those Smurfs: A wicked sorceress casts a spell on the Smurfs, forcing them to love themselves and not each other. Vanity, who's always like that, was away at the time, but notices the change when he returns. He breaks the spell by getting all the Smurfs to eat humble pie baked by a wizard.

programme.title: Monster Smurfs
programme.desc: This is spook-a-Smurf eve, and all the Smurfs get ready for the fancy dress party… But Brainy Smurf gets hold of Papa Smurf's Book of Magic, and all the Smurfs are changed into hideous but funny creatures. Yet danger lurks...

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - A Loss Of Smurfs: When the emergency call rings, all the Smurfs in the Village drop what they are doing and run to hear the news. But when Vanity Smurf calls for an assembly so that the Smurfs can admire his new hat, it is too much. They send him on his way out of the village, and Vanity has the bad luck of meeting Lofty, the Elf, who suggests a horrible mud bath...

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - The Lost City Of Yore: Curiosity brings Nosey Smurf to the lair of the Hag Sisters, who want to find the terrifying Sceptre of Yore... And Gargamel wants to cheat the two witches as he tries to destroy the Smurfs.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - The Smurfs' Springtime: The wicked wizard Gargamel asks the sorcerer Balthazar for a recipe to capture the Smurfs. It involves kidnapping Mother Nature to stop the arrival of Spring. Luckily, the Smurfs save the day.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Hogatha's Hearththrob: Hogatha the witch promises Gargamel a magical whistle if he will introduce her to the warlock of her dreams. But they are both deceived by each other's trickery: Gargamel dresses up as the warlock, and Hogatha's magical whistle is only a birdcall.

programme.title: Queen Smurfette
programme.desc: Smurfette becomes Queen for a day on her birthday. But this gets out of hand when Father Time falls asleep, neglecting to end the days. Tempers begin to flare among the Smurfs, who are tired of servitude. Papa rushes to wake Father Time and brings peace again to Smurfland.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - All The Smurf's A Stage: Poet Smurf's new play is going to be his greatest work ever, and it will feature the most favourite Smurf of all: Smurfette in the leading female role. All the other Smurfs vie for the honour of playing opposite Smurfette. Even Timid Smurf, who is the shy and retiring type, is a candidate for the part. Brainy Smurf, self-appointed manager of the play, does not see it that way...

programme.title: The Smurfs And The Money Tree
programme.desc: The wicked wizard Gargamel has come up with yet another diabolical plan with the help of his mother, who isn't much nicer than him. He wants to tempt the Smurfs with money of which they have no notion. Will Greedy take the bait?

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - The Last Smurfberry: Papa Smurf organizes a crew to sail to Smurfberry Island because Gargamel has killed all of the trees except one to trap the Smurfs. Gargamel follows them, but once more fails to catch them because the Witch of Smurfberry Island sends her nose-eating seagulls after them.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Smurf A Mile In My Shoes: The Smurfs band together to retrieve a sea-shell they need to release a hermit imp from the Sea Witch, as she cursed him with ugliness and a language very few understand. The Smurfs return with the sea-shell in time to break the curse and return the hermit to the handsome imp he once was.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - The Pussywillow Pixies: Clumsy Smurf's misadventures take him across a river into Pussywillow Hollow. There he meets the Pixies – charming and shapely beings whose enemies, the Wartmongers, will meet the Smurfs in some unforeseen ways.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Smurfing For Gold: Gargamel the evil wizard is in trouble again. If he can't find an enormous amount of gold by sundown, all his possessions will be taken away from him. But the Smurfs are going to help their arch-enemy... Up to a point.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Bubble, Bubble, Smurfs In Trouble: Each morning, dew is deposited by water sprites on forest leaves. Wait till you see what happens when Scaredy Smurf gets hold of the dew-making magic wand...

programme.title: The Gargoyle Of Quarrel Castle
programme.desc: In Quarrel Castle, you almost never hear a kind word. Both Selwyn the Warlock and Tallulah, his witch-mate, spend their time quarrelling. Tharp, their pet gargoyle, takes refuge in the Village of Smurfs. But something terrible is going to happen....

programme.title: Essence Of Brainy
programme.desc: Brainy Smurf is not the same anymore. He is polite, considerate, modest and calls every other Smurf Sir or Madame. All the Smurfs are worried that Brainy has lost all that makes his personality. They ought to be worried, for Brainy has been the victim of a system called an Essence Remover that Scruple, Gargamel's apprentice, uses... But Brainy's essence is coming back!

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - The Sand Witch: A swamp monster kidnaps Baby as a gift for a witch. The witch, who thinks no one loves her, is amazed when Baby shows affection. When Papa comes to rescue Baby, he makes the witch understand that the loyal swamp monster has always loved her.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Tubbies watch a little boy peel and mash some eggs for an egg mayonnaise sandwich. The Teletubbies laugh when they make a tune whilst eating their Tubby Custard.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: A voice trumpet rises to tell the Teletubbies 'Christmas is a Coming'. They hurry up the slide to see some children decorate a Christmas Tree. The Teletubbies get excited when their own Christmas Tree appears in Teletubbyland.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies line up to say 'Eh-oh' and then watch Matthew and Mark feed a baby calf. The Teletubbies play a game to see who can eat their Tubby Custard the slowest, but Po can't wait and eats her Tubby Custard very fast.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Tubbies watch some children are playing football in the park. Laa-Laa and Po love playing with the ball. While they play they sing a song about the ball.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: Po fetches the other to watch Andy Brown and two children look for some rabbits. In Teletubbyland, Tinky Winky is looking for Po. He looks for her everywhere, but she is hiding from him. When he finds her all the Tubbies dance a happy dance.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies watch two boys make Chinese Lanterns with their uncle. In Teletubbyland, it is time for Tubby Toast, but where has Laa-Laa's toast gone?

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies see some children visit a level crossing and watch a train pass by. The Teletubbies play their Ready, Steady, Go game.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: Two children are making Christmas crackers for each other. Dipsy is very pleased to find his present is a cracker. He looks for someone to pull the cracker. It makes a lovely pink bang and the Teletubbies laugh when they fall over.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies dance around the trees and watch some children drum with their friend Norris. Tinky Winky dance on the roof of Home Hill and wakes up the other Tubbies.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies dance a jumping dance before stopping to watch Yvette wash up her plastic cups and saucers. The Teletubbies have a very messy day. So Noo-Noo has to tidy everything up.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies watch some children looking at penguins waddling and swimming. In Teletubbyland, the Tubbies play walk fast and slow, far and near and other different ways.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: In Teletubbyland, the Tubbies are trying to be quiet. They watch Oscar read the story of the Gingerbread Boy to his brother Felix. A voice trumpet appears and sings the nursery rhyme.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies are eating Tubby Toast. They stop to watch Amy making pasta. A ball of string appears in Teletubbyland. Po knocks the string in to the air with her scooter and it makes a stringy mess all over Teletubbyland.

programme.title: A Wonderful Christmas
programme.desc: The true meaning of Christmas comes home to the Rivera household...in a very unexpected way. With Mom expecting a new baby and Dad facing work challenges, young Josie takes it upon herself to make sure the family is able to have a wonderful Christmas.

programme.title: 12 Gifts of Christmas
programme.desc: When Anna, an unemployed painter, is unable to make ends meet, she is hired to become a personal Christmas shopper for Marc, an uptight corporate exec. As they work together, Marc learns that Christmas giving has less to do with the amount of money spent and more to do with the importance of the gift, while Anna discovers she might find success as an artist in a way she never expected.

programme.title: Looks Like Christmas
programme.desc: From cooking to decorating, Carol sleeps and breathes Christmas, so it's no wonder the town refers to her as “Christmas Carol” but when a handsome man comes to town and challenges her traditional holiday views, Carol must learn how to compromise even if it means facing an unexpected romance.

programme.title: My Christmas Wish (Christmas Comes Home)
programme.desc: On the verge of a promotion, a successful Real Estate broker, ABBEY, is forced back to her hometown to repair a Victorian inherited from her grandmother. Upon returning home, she decides to sell the house and hires a single dad, JOSH, to help with the repairs. Together they find a delightful Christmas treasure hidden in the home by Abbey's grandmother.

programme.title: Set Up

programme.title: Little Accidents
programme.desc: In a small American town still living in the shadow of a terrible coal mine accident, the disappearance of a teenage boy draws together a surviving miner, the lonely wife of a mine executive, and a local boy in a web of secrets.

programme.title: Cut Bank
