programme.title: The Big Take
programme.desc: A reclusive movie star hires a private detective after he's anonymously blackmailed. Things turn violent when an aspiring writer is fingered for the crime in a dangerous case of mistaken identity.

programme.title: In Their Skin
programme.desc: The Hughes' cottage vacation is violently interrupted by a family on a murderous and identity-stealing journey, in search of the "perfect" life.

programme.title: Love Finds You in Sugarcreek
programme.desc: A father and son fleeing a shocking and brutal tragedy settle in the predominantly Amish town of Sugarcreek, Ohio. They are taken in by three sisters who offer the father work as a handyman, but a local policewoman begins to become suspicious of his past.

programme.title: Love's Portrait
programme.desc: Lily, a museum curator, discovers a painting that looks just like her and is sent to find where the painting came from and who painted it. She tracks the painting down to the post office it was sent from in Ireland. There she meets William and Saoirse, a brother-sister duo who run the post, and who offer her help and friendship on her quest. But William knows more than he's letting on. Will he reveal what he knows if it risks his growing relationship--and mutual love--with Lily?

programme.title: Retreat to Paradise
programme.desc: Ellie tends to the injured and cantankerous Jordan as he heals from a shoulder injury. Though he struggles to learn to use his arm again, his attitude leaves Ellie wanting to leave him in his misery. But as they get to know each other more, Jordan starts to see Ellie is exactly who he wants in his life, and hopes Ellie feels the same way.

programme.title: Passport to Love
programme.desc: Nicole, a successful travel blogger, meets Kade, a marketing rep for a travel publishing company, and they form the beginnings of a relationship while exploring an island destination. They juggle their work traveling around the world while seeing each other again. Both know there's something special between them, but it will be put to the test when Kade's competitive boss challenges Kade to thwart Nicole's business.

programme.title: High Lonesome
programme.desc: When a sudden spurt of murders occurs in Texas Big Bend country, suspicion immediately falls on a young drifter who just moved to the area.

programme.title: The Black Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Two black bounty hunters ride into a small town out West in pursuit of an outlaw. They discover that the town has no sheriff, and soon take over that position, much against the will of the mostly white townsfolk. They raise hell, chase women, and milk the locals for cash, while waiting for the opportunity to get their man

programme.title: Yellow Hair and the Fortress of Gold
programme.desc: Fiery blonde half-breed Yellow Hair and her easygoing sidekick the Pecos Kid are after a fortune in Mayan gold.

programme.title: Payment in Blood
programme.desc: In 1867 Texas, after the Civil War, Colonel Thomas Blake and his men refuse to surrender, raiding Yankee towns. Rumors swirl that Blake kills for pleasure, not the Confederacy, leading to large bounties for his capture. However, Blake seeks $200,000 that vanished during the war from Confederate coffers. He sends Chamaco Gonzales to track down the missing fortune, hidden in General Beauregard's strong box.

programme.title: Tequila aka Fuzzy the Hero
programme.desc: Tequila and Bobo hit the little town of Chedron intending to rob the local bank whose owner, De Koven, is trying to freeze out all the ranchers in the area by the simple expedient of foreclosing on the mortgages his bank holds on their land.

programme.title: Miss Me This Christmas
programme.desc: Regina moves into her friend's suite at The Chesterton Hotel as she waits for her divorce settlement to come through on Christmas Day. While there, she starts a whirlwind romance with a billionaire, who proposes to her.

programme.title: Sincerely, Yours Truly
programme.desc: When Hayley finds a wedding ring with a letter hidden in a drawer in her new condo, she decides to write back… and the mysterious lover replies, starting a chain of letters and events that will change her life for ever!

programme.title: The Dating List
programme.desc: Abby Morel is a bright, young editor's assistant living in the big city. Wanting to get ahead in her career, she makes an unusual deal with her high-flying boss, Susan. Susan is far too busy to date, but she wants to fall in love.

programme.title: Accidentally In Love
programme.desc: Edie finds true love in London just days before she is to return to the US. They are separated, but as fate would have it, they reunite 6 years later in the US.

programme.title: Metal Tornado
programme.desc: An American company inadvertently unleashes a magnetic vortex on an unprepared world. The earth's upper atmosphere is supercharged by a monstrous solar flare creating massive magnetic vortexes that shoot down to Earth in the form of giant tornados. These magnetic tornados begin drawing all metal objects into themselves, pulverizing everything in their path as they tear across the planet!

programme.title: Hunting Souls
programme.desc: Hunting Souls is the story of an American couple who are dealing with the hardships of caring for their sick child. They discover that they are being hunted by a demon.

programme.title: Demonic
programme.desc: A group of teenage ghost hunters travel to a supposedly haunted house in an attempt to summon spirits from the dead. After performing a Seance, things begin to go drastically wrong and the evening descends into sheer horror.

programme.title: River Queen
programme.desc: A young family are embroiled in the turbulent war between the British and Maori during the colonization of New Zealand.

programme.title: The Mother of the Lamb
programme.desc: Cristina (49) has spent her life taking care of her mother Carmen. Single and without a trade or friends, she grows older, year after year in her hometown. A few days from her birth- day, Cristina reconnects with Sandra, a former schoolmate who will show

programme.title: Human
programme.desc: He is a silent man. He walks the streets, watching, looking for the right place. He finds it. In the middle of a market…

programme.title: Human
programme.desc: He is a silent man. He walks the streets, watching, looking for the right place. He finds it. In the middle of a market…

programme.title: True Smile
programme.desc: True smile is the story about a trip through the empty glance of an autist and blind boy who crosses 1.300 kms in tandem bycicle with his brother. This documentary inmerses us into the Sergio's unreachable world, that seems to the desert, the destination of their trip.

programme.title: Sullivan
programme.desc: An unlikely young man imagines himself as the greatest football player of all time, but in doing so, hides behind a false persona instead of being himself.

programme.title: The Girl With Bangs
programme.desc: When coincidence and timing change the direction of two women's lives, their second meeting raises the questions about the power of fate and luck and our own choices when it comes to love.

programme.title: Bridge The
programme.desc: The film delves into the life of a young girl as her perception of the world as she knows it falls completely apart in just over a night in London, when her sister goes missing.

programme.title: Don't Fade Away
programme.desc: Life was easy for Jackson White (RYAN KWANTEN). With looks, brains, and athletic ability, the possibilities seemed endless. But when he came to New York City to pursue a career in the music industry, he was so seduced by money and status that he lost track of who he was. Now, with both his personal and professional lives on the brink of disaster, he retreats home to care for his dying father (BEAU BRIDGES). While in North Carolina, he confronts the friends he lost track of and the girl he left behind (MISCHA BARTON).

programme.title: The Red House
programme.desc: An old man and his sister are concealing a terrible secret from their adopted teen daughter, concerning a hidden abandoned farmhouse, located deep in the woods.

programme.title: The Hummingbird Project
programme.desc: A pair of high-frequency traders go up against their old boss in an effort to make millions in a fibre-optic cable deal.

programme.title: Waiting
programme.desc: Ryan Reynolds, Anna Ferris, and Justin Long serve up the laughs as young waiters and waitresses searching for the meaning of life, love, and friendship in this outrageous comedy.

programme.title: Gigantic
programme.desc: Mattress salesman Brian Weathersby (Paul Dano) falls in love with a woman (Zooey Deschanel) who comes to his store and falls asleep on one of his beds. Also starring John Goodman.

programme.title: After Life
programme.desc: After a horrific car accident, Anna (Christina Ricci) wakes up to find the funeral director (Liam Neeson) preparing her body for her funeral.

programme.title: Sharknado
programme.desc: When a freak tornado swamps Los Angeles, thousands of man-eating sharks are sucked into the swirling vortex, terrorizing the waterlogged populace and flooding the city with shark-infested seawater. Surfer and bar-owner Fin (Ian Ziering, Beverley Hills, 90210) sets out with his friends Baz (Jaason Simmons, Baywatch) and Nova to rescue his estranged wife April and teenage daughter Claudia from the sharks raining down from the skies. With nature's deadliest killer ruling sea, land, and air, they soon realise that the only way to survive the deadly shark-infested maelstrom is to tackle it head on. Their plan? Commandeer a helicopter and fly close enough to launch bombs directly into the tornado!

programme.title: Daybreakers
programme.desc: As the human population nears extinction, vampires must capture and farm every remaining human, or find a blood substitute before time runs out. However, a covert group of vampires makes a remarkable discovery, one which has the power to save the human race.

programme.title: Archenemy
programme.desc: Max Fist, who claims to be a hero from another dimension who fell through time and space to earth, where he has no powers.No one believes his stories except for a local teen named Hamster.

programme.title: Time Loop
programme.desc: A young Londoner scientist running experiments with his father in a quite Italian village, has to face the consequences of choices he hasn't made yet.

programme.title: It Had to be You
programme.desc: When her ad agency is absorbed by a much larger, more powerful firm, Darby's rivalry with new partner Derrick could blossom into something else.

programme.title: I Am That
programme.desc: A nun's eight-day adventure to resolve questions of doubt unites her with a gentle teenager and a handsome drifter who affects her heart and future.

programme.title: At Home With Tori
programme.desc: Tori teams up with Million Dollar Matchmaker Patti Stanger to host a series of dates for Morgan, one of her single friends.

programme.title: Mediator
programme.desc: A family counselor in the missing children's division becomes a mediator between the living and the missing.

programme.title: My Daddy is in Heaven
programme.desc: Becky, Adam and their 5-year-old daughter Acie are a perfect family until a tragic accident during a 4th of July celebration kills their father. Struggling with grief, Becky decides she needs to leave the family farm and all its memories. She leaves Acie with her grandfather Ben and visits with her friend from school, June. With all the best intent, June offers Becky plenty of distraction from her family life. Fueled by her anger at G*d and loss of faith, Becky starts drinking and making other self-destructive choices. Then, after Becky is arrested, Ben threatens to keep Acie until Becky is back on track. A chance encounter in a bus station with a traveler gives Becky what she needs to restore her faith and reunite with her family.

programme.title: Heartbreakers
programme.desc: Max and Page are a mother and daughter con team with a devious routine. Max targets wealthy men, lures them into marriage and then the equally gorgeous Page seduces them, leaving Max to discover their infidelity and reap the huge divorce settlements which tide them over until they target their next victim. Having just scammed Dean the boss of a hot-car ring, they head for Palm Beach, Florida to pull off one final sting. They set their sights on their richest target to date: billionaire William B. Tensy of Tensy Tobacco. Meanwhile, unbeknown to either of them, Dean, furious but still heavily in lust, is hot on their trail!

programme.title: Romance and Cigarettes
programme.desc: Actor and filmmaker John Turturro wrote and directed this emotionally resonant blend of music and drama. Nick Murder (James Gandolfini) is an ironworker who has been married for years to Kitty (Susan Sarandon), who works as a seamstress and is the mother of Nick's three daughters. While Nick loves his wife, his head is turned by Tula (Kate Winslet), a sexy salesgirl at a lingerie shop, and soon they're having a passionate affair. When Kitty finds out about Nick's infidelity, she becomes enraged and kicks him out of the house, forcing him to decide what he really wants out of life and what is most important to him.

programme.title: Blind (2017)
programme.desc: Bestselling novelist, Bill Oakland loses his wife and his sight in a vicious car crash. Five years later Socialite Suzanne Dutchman is forced to read to Bill in an intimate room three times a week as a plea bargain for being associated with her husband's insider trading.

programme.title: I Could Never Be Your Woman
programme.desc: Rosie, a smart, successful single mom refuses to accept that life has passed her by just because she's turned 40. Then talented young actor Adam walks into her life and straight into her heart. Finally, Rosie seems to have met the right, but much younger, man. But is this just one more time she'll have to say I could never be your woman? An upbeat and acerbic romantic comedy directed by Amy Heckerling, featuring stellar cast: Michelle Pfeiffer, Paul Rudd, Saoirse Ronan, Jon Lovitz, Stacey Dash, Fred Willard, Sarah Alexander, Tracey Ullman, Henry Winkler.

programme.title: The Man with the Iron Heart
programme.desc: Two Czechs prepare for a suicide mission to assassinate the hideous mastermind behind the "Final Solution".

programme.title: Hacksaw Ridge
programme.desc: The true story of conscientious objector Desmond Doss who saved 75 men in WWII without firing a gun.

programme.title: The Man with the Iron Heart
programme.desc: Two Czechs prepare for a suicide mission to assassinate the hideous mastermind behind the "Final Solution".

programme.title: The Aviator
programme.desc: A biopic depicting the early years of aviator Howard Hughes' career from the late 1920s to the mid 1940s.

programme.title: The Monster
programme.desc: A mother and daughter must confront a terrifying monster when they break down on a deserted road.

programme.title: It Follows
programme.desc: For 19-year-old Jay (Maika Monroe), the fall should be about school, boys and weekends out at the lake. But after a seemingly innocent sexual encounter, she finds herself plagued by strange visions and the inescapable sense that someone, or something, is following her. Faced with this burden, Jay and her teenage friends must find a way to escape the horrors that seem to be only a few steps behind.

programme.title: Landmine Goes Click
programme.desc: Tense thriller starring Spencer Locke, Sterling Knight and Dean Geyer. Three American tourists are backpacking through the remote countryside of European Georgia when one of them gets trapped on an armed landmine. That seems to be a minor threat compared to the nightmarish happenings the rest of the afternoon will bring on however. A psychopath takes advantage of the tourist's immobility and brutally assaults the woman he loves.

programme.title: Last Girl Standing
programme.desc: Five years ago, a masked killer brutally murdered a group of friends. Since then, Camryn (Akasha Villalobos), the lone survivor, has struggled to reclaim her shattered life. Wracked with guilt and paranoia, Camryn leads a depressingly lonely existence until Nick (Brian Villalobos), a new co-worker, befriends Camryn and attempts to integrate her into his group of friends. Just when she might be ready to start a new life, Camryn's past comes back to haunt her. Can Camryn ever have a life again, or is she destined to be alone?

programme.title: The Bay of Silence
programme.desc: Do you truly know the ones you love? When Will (Claes Bang) discovers his wife (Olga Kurylenko) and three children have suddenly disappeared, his perfect world begins to unravel. Setting out on a frantic search and finding them in a remote village in northern France, relief soon turns to horror as he discovers that his infant son has mysteriously died. Also starring Succession's Brian Cox.

programme.title: Bar Fight!
programme.desc: Time to settle the score, one drink at a time. Theres only one way to assert dominance after a break up and for Nina (Melissa Fumero, Brooklyn Nine-Nine) and Allen (Luka Jones, Up All Night) its a turf war for their local watering hole. Lines have been drawn and with the help of Ninas best friend Chelsea (Rachel Bloom, Crazy Ex-Girlfriend) its going to be a winner takes all affair.

programme.title: Enemy Lines
programme.desc: Courage has no borders in this action-packed WWII thriller. November 1943. A British commando squad and American officer (Ed Westwick: Gossip Girl) are on a covert mission, deep behind enemy lines in Poland. Intent on extracting a sought-after Polish scientist, Dr Fabian (Pawel Delag: Schindlers List) from the Germans, the team have to contend with a German hunter unit and a Russian squad.

programme.title: The Bunker
programme.desc: This nighmareish horror will have you running towards the nearest exit. When Ella (Mischa Barton) discovers her Wall Street banker boyfriend is renting a secret storage unit, she becomes suspicious. Breaking in with her friend Molly (Emily Atack) they discover something sinister. Now trapped in the darkened building with a bunch of neurotic strangers, they must fight for their lives. Unmissable!

programme.title: A Young Man with High Potential
programme.desc: This shocking, controversial horror thriller sees an uptight man succumb to his inner desires. Piet is a socially awkward, lonely and reclusive student, who catches up on classes online. This changes when he is forced to partner a project with new student Klara. Soon he becomes fixated with her. After his advances are rebuffed, he starts down a dark and despicable path.

programme.title: A Dogwalker's Christmas Tale
programme.desc: A young dogwalker has until Christmas to save a popular park from being destroyed by a greedy developer. But first she must put aside her own selfish ways. Stars Lexi Giovagnoli (2015)

programme.title: A Dogwalker's Christmas Tale
programme.desc: A young dogwalker has until Christmas to save a popular park from being destroyed by a greedy developer. But first she must put aside her own selfish ways. Stars Lexi Giovagnoli (2015)

programme.title: A Family For The Holidays
programme.desc: Sequel to 'Finding Father Christmas'. Miranda is exited to return to Vermont and spend Christmas with Ian and her long-lost family. But will a chance meeting threaten her future happiness? (2017)

programme.title: A Family For The Holidays
programme.desc: Sequel to 'Finding Father Christmas'. Miranda is exited to return to Vermont and spend Christmas with Ian and her long-lost family. But will a chance meeting threaten her future happiness? (2017)

programme.title: Christmas Cupcakes
programme.desc: Two rival sisters are forced to work together to save the family bakery from bankruptcy. Will their entry into a television baking competition bring them a much-needed Christmas miracle? (2018)

programme.title: Christmas Cupcakes
programme.desc: Two rival sisters are forced to work together to save the family bakery from bankruptcy. Will their entry into a television baking competition bring them a much-needed Christmas miracle? (2018)

programme.title: Beverly Hill Christmas
programme.desc: A spoilt, rich, young teenage girl is about to find that true value is not found in price tags and 'things' but by the kind acts of helping others with the helping hand of a guardian angel (2015)

programme.title: Beverly Hill Christmas
programme.desc: A spoilt, rich, young teenage girl is about to find that true value is not found in price tags and 'things' but by the kind acts of helping others with the helping hand of a guardian angel (2015)

programme.title: Enchanted Christmas
programme.desc: Returning to her hometown to restore a derelict hotel in time for Christmas Eve, a young widow discovers that old passions and true love can never be fully forgotten. Alexa PenaVega stars. (2017)

programme.title: Enchanted Christmas
programme.desc: Returning to her hometown to restore a derelict hotel in time for Christmas Eve, a young widow discovers that old passions and true love can never be fully forgotten. Alexa PenaVega stars. (2017)

programme.title: Mid Love Crisis
programme.desc: A single-mother realizes she's in a mid-life crisis. Starring Teri Hatcher (2022)

programme.title: Love at The Ranch
programme.desc: Journalist Allison Sawyer visits the remote Clybourne Ranch, the setting of her favourite author's books. Starring Laura Mitchell (2021)

programme.title: Love Off the Page
programme.desc: When a hopeless romantic bookworm buys a book at a mysterious bookstore, she starts dreaming about love. Starring Malone Thomas (2022)

programme.title: One Winter Weekend
programme.desc: A recently dumped travel writer goes on a ski getaway with her best friend and they find themselves double booked with two eligible men. When they are snowed in, love ensues, as it always does. (2018)

programme.title: A Midnight Kiss
programme.desc: With only one week's notice to prepare, Mia enlists a relative stranger to help her plan a client's New Year's Eve party. But did she plan on falling in love? Stars Carlos PenaVega. (2018)

programme.title: THE UNCANNY
programme.desc: Peter Cushing stars as Wilbur Gray, an eccentric author.

programme.title: Act of Murder
programme.desc: An actor attempts to win back his former mistress by putting stress on her husband - poisoning the family dog, farm animals at their country place, simulating a robbery attempt

programme.title: THE ARSENAL STADIUM MYSTERY
programme.desc: Classic crime drama. During a charity match between Arsenal and the Trojans, the Trojans' striker mysteriously collapses in full view of the capacity crowd. When it is discovered that he has been poisoned, Scotland Yard is called in to investigate.

programme.title: CHECKPOINT
programme.desc: A gunshot rings out in an Italian motor factory, the watchman lies dead and the safe door is open. As the police arrive, a figure disappears into the shadows and fires at a mercury cylinder. Who is responsible and what do they want?

programme.title: DON'T EVER LEAVE ME
programme.desc: Jack Denton's grandfather Harry comes out of prison. He is soon up to his old tricks: embarrassment and chaos follow.

programme.title: Kings
programme.desc: Millie (Halle Berry), a tough Los Angeles single foster mother and her neighbour Obie (Daniel Craig) must become allies as the city erupts in riots after the Rodney King trial in 1992.

programme.title: The Tall Man
programme.desc: COLD ROCK, U.S.A. - on the surface just a small town like any other. However, the residents of Cold Rock are quietly living with a horrible truth: their children keep disappearing, leaving neither a clue nor a witness.

programme.title: Cherish
programme.desc: After a martini-induced rampage, a fantasy-prone young woman is placed under house arrest.

programme.title: World's Greatest Dad
programme.desc: Lance Clayton dreamed of being a rich and famous writer, but has only managed to make it as a high school teacher. Then, in the wake of a freak accident, he is faced with the possibility of all the fortune and popularity he ever dreamed of, if he can live with the knowledge of how he got there.

programme.title: The Exorcist III
programme.desc: A police lieutenant uncovers more than he bargained for as his investigation of a series of murders, which have all the hallmarks of the deceased 'Gemini' serial killer, lead him to question the patients of a psychiatric ward.

programme.title: The Evil Dead (1983)
programme.desc: Writer/Director SAM RAIMI's relentless, gore-spattered debut is a landmark in horror cinema, a no-holds-barred onslaught of gruesome terror and nightmarish effects which has earned its rightful status as a legendary cult classic. Five college students travel to a remote cabin in the woods and unwittingly unleash a monstrous evil force hellbent on their total destruction. Now with newly restored state-of-the-art digitally remastered picture and loaded with incredible extras, THE EVIL DEAD is truly the ultimate experience in grueling horror.

programme.title: Lake Placid 3
programme.desc: In this sequel to Lake Placid 2 (the most watched Syfy Saturday Original Movie ever), a game warden, his wife and their young son move into their aunt's cabin on Lake Placid, where the lonely boy starts feeding baby crocodiles he views as pets. Three years later, the crocs start looking at him and his family as their food.

programme.title: U-Turn
programme.desc: A small-time gambler gets more than he bargained for when his car breaks down near a remote desert town.

programme.title: Freaks of Nature
programme.desc: Aliens invade the earth as teenagers, zombies and vampire fight each other to the death and they must all band together and suppress their urge to kill each other long enough to repel the invasion.

programme.title: Pineapple Express
programme.desc: Process Server Dale Denton has a grudging business relationship with the laconic Saul Silver, deigning to visit only to purchase Saul's primo product ' a rare new strain of pot called Pineapple Express. But when Dale becomes the only witness to a murder by a crooked cop and the city's most dangerous drug lord, he panics and dumps the Pineapple Express at the scene. When it's traced back to him, Dale and Saul run for their lives' and they quickly discover that they're not just suffering from weed-fueled paranoia. If they survive, these two just might become real friends.

programme.title: Deuce Bigalow: European Gigolo
programme.desc: Deuce Bigalow takes a vacation to Amsterdam to reconnect with his pal T.J. and visit a world famous aquarium. But when T.J. is falsely accused of murder, Deuce must return to romancing lonely women in order to smoke out the real killer. Along the way, he must compete against real European gigolos and he falls in love with the police chief's daughter.

programme.title: Punchline
programme.desc: Stand-up comedy hopefuls toil in obscurity at a New York club while waiting for their big break.

programme.title: To Write Love on Her Arms
programme.desc: Based on a true story, this musical drama tells the story of how artistic fantasy, music and friendships helped teenager Renee embark on a courageous journey towards recovery.

programme.title: The Dark Horse
programme.desc: The Dark Horse is a provocative, emotionally charged drama about a man who searches for the courage to lead, despite his own adversities, finding purpose and hope in passing on his gift to the children in his community.

programme.title: Stonewall
programme.desc: As Danny and his friends experience discrimination, endure atrocities and are repeatedly harassed by the police, we see a rage begin to build. This emotion runs through the entire community of young gays, lesbians, drag queens and trans people who populate the Stonewall Inn and erupts in a storm of anger.

programme.title: Magic Beyond Words
programme.desc: For lovers of Harry Potter, Magic Beyond Words is a must see movie. An inspiring look at JK Rowling's rise to become one of the most influential writers-from her humble beginnings, as an imaginative young girl and awkward teenager, to the loss of her mother and the genesis of the Harry Potter phenomenon.

programme.title: Bunraku
programme.desc: Bunraku is the story of a a young man who has spent his life searching for revenge only to find himself up against a bigger challenge than he originally bargained for.

programme.title: Bad Blood
programme.desc: Hannah (Abigail Breslin) is a bright teen girl trapped in the dark Southern underworld of violence, guns, drugs and vicious biker gangs. Neglected by her angry sister Amber (Alexa Vega), her only refuge is her troubled uncle Donny, who is a drug addict.

programme.title: L.A. Confidential
programme.desc: Amidst corruption, murder and the glamour of famous movie stars, three police officers fight to uncover the truth of a brutal mass murder.

programme.title: Mehek S1 E29
programme.desc: Zindagi Ki Mehek is an Indian television drama series that aired from 2016 to 2018. The story revolves around Mehek Sharma, a talented cook from a middle-class family, and Shaurya Khanna, a wealthy and arrogant restaurateur. Their paths cross when Mehek participates in a cooking competition that Shaurya is judging. Despite their contrasting personalities and initial conflicts, they fall in love and face numerous challenges together, including family opposition and personal vendettas. The show blends themes of love, family, and ambition with a strong emphasis on culinary arts.

programme.title: Dholi Beats S1 E29

programme.title: Jodha Akbar S1 E30
programme.desc: Jodha Akbar is a period drama set in the sixteenth century, focusing on the political marriage between Mughal Emperor Akbar and Rajput Princess Jodha Bai. Initially a marriage of convenience, it evolves into a deep love story that changes the fate of India. The series portrays the era's wars, the complex relationships between the Mughals and Rajputs, and the political dynamics of the royal court. Akbar, raised as a ruthless conqueror, learns the meaning of love and compassion through Jodha, who despises the Mughals for their invasions. Their relationship transforms Akbar from a heartless ruler into the beloved Emperor Akbar, known for his justice and wisdom.

programme.title: The Peninsula
programme.desc: Mountains are responsible for the whole morphology of Iberia. They are also the birthplace of the rivers that distribute life throughout the territory.

programme.title: Meet The Meerkats
programme.desc: Meerkats live in close families and rely on their companions to watch their backs. In their vast and unforgiving home of the Namib desert, only together can they defeat the odds stacked against them. One young female is forced from her group, overcoming a brutal attack from the alpha pair and fearing for her life. Cast out and left to fend for herself, she has no choice but to roam the desert and find a way to live. Her only chance is to find a new pack to shelter her from the dangers of her home.

programme.title: Nature's Cutest
programme.desc: As we all know the natural world can be tough and challenging at times, but it can also be nothing short of adorable.

programme.title: Kalahari Meerkats
programme.desc: The Gosa Gang have recently moved to a new home known as Fortress burrow. It is close to the Gosa Dam where a rival family of meerkats live.In the quest for territorial dominance there has been a major meerkat standoff. This has resulted in both gangs losing a member of their tribe.

programme.title: Peace Parks
programme.desc: In this series, we follow the trail of the Transfrontier Parks. We explore why these conservation areas are important and what they protect. Through the eyes of the local communities and the conservation bodies, we follow a trail along the major rivers, mountains and deserts to see what can be achieved if countries work together to conserve a shared heritage.

programme.title: Peace Parks
programme.desc: In this series, we follow the trail of the Transfrontier Parks. We explore why these conservation areas are important and what they protect. programme.title: Shark Alley
programme.desc: Hundreds of sharks follow and feed upon millions upon millions of sardines as the fish migrate up the south-eastern coast of Africa. Bronze Whalers, Ragged-Tooths, Hammerheads, Black-Tips, Duskies, Tigers, Bulls and the Big Daddy of them all – the Great White – are joined by dolphins, Cape gannets, seals and even a whale. It's ambush after ambush in a relentless series of attacks that climaxes with a humongous feeding frenzy. It's the largest predation of its kind on earth.

programme.title: The Peninsula
programme.desc: One of the most iconic habitats of the Iberia is the Mediterranean forest, the land of the Iberian Lynx, a unique and fascinating feline, with a history of success in conservation efforts

programme.title: Stories of the Mediterranean Forest: Sierra Morena
programme.desc: The Mediterranean Basin is one of the planet's most biologically rich and complex regions. The crossroads of Europe, Asia and Africa is considered to be one of Earth's biodiversity hotspots. A vast number of both animal and plant species unique to the region live in its various habitats. The Mediterranean Basin is located in one of the planet's temperate zones. The subtropical climate makes it colder and wet here in winter, hot and dry in summer and mild and rainy in autumn and spring.

programme.title: The Canary Islands
programme.sub-title: In the Shadows of the Volcanoes
programme.desc: The Canary Islands were born in the depths of the ocean. Forged by fire and sculpted by winds and waves, this volcanic land offers landscapes of colossal force and almost unreal beauty.

programme.title: mareTV
programme.desc: Wide open spaces, water, meadows: The Limfjord stretches through Jutland in Denmark in countless bays, canals and sounds. Mighty water castles, country palaces and magnificent monasteries are enthroned on its shores. It is a rather lonely area, even in high summer it is quiet. This is probably why the people here are so friendly and sociable. Birte, Silla and Bo cycle to their fjord garden project in the harbor of the town of Løgstør to harvest mussels, oysters and seaweed. They think gardening is best in a club. Luckily, Silla, a resourceful tinkerer, has just made another ingenious invention: the mussel washing machine. Cruising the narrow Næssund, a branch of the Limfjord, is the Næssund Ferry, the smallest and oldest car ferry in the area. New on board, and the first and only woman on this ship, is deckhand Lilian Kohler. She is "girl for everything", but wants more, because Lilian is a trained navigator. She is magically drawn to the bridge, but the old captain doesn't think much of retiring ashore.

programme.title: mareTV
programme.desc: No city shines in summer like Saint Petersburg: the golden domes gleam by day, and during the White Nights in June, the sun does not set but conjures a mystical twilight. The magnificent buildings of the tsarist era meet a modern generation of Russians who celebrate their city and are proud of its founder, Peter the Great. The young seamstress Maria Korolenko restores original garments of the tsar in the summer palace, Peterhof. She often works for months on a single jacket, an exclusive glimpse behind the scenes of one of Europe's most magnificent treasure troves. At night, Maria is drawn to the Neva River just like thousands of residents: they dance, sing, paint or fish.

programme.title: mareTV
programme.sub-title: The white wilderness in Greenland's East
programme.desc: Fjords, glaciers and the highest mountains in the Arctic: East Greenland with its spectacular nature is one of the most sparsely populated regions on earth. The people here live in extreme isolation and depend on helicopter flights for their supplies. Despite harsh conditions, the inhabitants here lovingly maintain their traditions and enjoy their outdoor leisure time even at minus 20 degrees Celsius. The town of Tasiilaq is the "metropolis" with 4,000 inhabitants and offers a very special attraction: the only ski lift on the east coast. Thomas Mikaelsen, the lift attendant, is not to be envied for his job. The only 100 meter long lift comes from Switzerland and is already 20 years old. If Thomas gets the drag lift running at all, it often only lasts for an hour. Then the ski crazy's luck depends on his repair skills. The lift is the only frosty open-air pleasure. For Salo Kunuk his sled dogs are both pleasure and work. He is currently teaching his daughter Karla how to steer a dog sled, private driving lessons from her father, so to speak. Karla will need it, because in the eternal ice the sled is the only means of transportation.

programme.title: mareTV
programme.desc: Fjord, ford, bay, gulf: there are many names for the beautiful extensions of the Baltic Sea into the country. Eckernförde Bay is shaped by currents, surf and people. It stretches 17 kilometers to the town that gives it its name. Stephan Möller is the acting shooting master of the Eckernförder Bürgerschützengilde. He spent a whole year preparing the beach shooting festival and then this: fog, rain and a stiff breeze. Traditionally, the Eckernförde marksmen always shoot at a wooden bird in the direction of the sea at Whitsun. Under strict conditions! And these stipulate a clear view of at least one kilometer out into the bay. The event literally threatens to fall through, for the first time in 449 years. Around 3,000 soldiers are stationed at the Eckernförde naval base, but only a small group is allowed to call itself an elite unit: the mine divers. They are considered the toughest soldiers in the Navy. Anyone who wants to be one of them has to undergo extreme training. This year, just two candidates made it to the final round. Now they still have to pass the dreaded final exam: running 20 kilometers with marching gear and then swimming ten kilometers through Eckernförde Bay.

programme.title: mareTV
programme.desc: The Wismar Bay is unique in its diversity on the Mecklenburg Baltic Sea coast: cliffs, sandy beaches, salt marshes, enchanted islands and, last but not least, the proud Hanseatic city of Wismar with its brick Gothic buildings, which are a UNESCO World Heritage Site. When the mighty logs get wedged together in the timber mill in the port of Wismar, Steven Buchholz has to get to work with his chainsaw. It's a dangerous job, because the logs weigh tons. As a trained carpenter, Steven is a virtuoso with the chain saw. Even after his shift is over, he is looking for the thrill: the wind off his home island of Poel is favorable that day and he wants to reclaim the German record in the kite surfing high jump. For a long time, Ramona Stelzer only knew fish as a tasty ingredient between two halves of a bun. But when the goldsmith got her hands on fish leather, her business idea was born: she processes the unique natural product fish skin into fine jewelry. The problem is that hardly anyone in Germany tans fish skin. In order to reliably obtain supplies, Ramona now wants to learn this craft herself.

programme.title: In Search of Old Russia: St. Petersburg
programme.sub-title: The Enchantment of the White Nights
programme.desc: This series delves deep into this more than thousand-year-old cultural history in Europe's East. For the very first time, sensational footage, shot by the world's best cameramen, presents a bird's-eye view of the most important and most beautiful buildings of Old Russia. The camera explores en detail art and ornamentation, mounted on high on these splendid structures centuries ago to the glory of God, far above the line of vision of humans. Authors familiar with Russian culture find the material for their stories beneath the roofs and golden onion-shaped towers, which tell of old traditions, passions and visions. Russian and Ukrainian protagonists fill the stories, which encompass this unique culture and architecture, time and again with their warmth, their love and a good portion of humor. They proudly present the old Russian legacy that during the World War and in the old Soviet Union days, constantly threatened to disappear.

programme.title: SCL 2022 Season 8, Episode 1, Finland Stage 1
programme.desc: We are back, after a short break it feels like we never even left. We're here in Vaasa - Finland kicking off 2022 new world series. If you are watching at home, just like these people, you're in the right place. Because this is a special edition world record breaker. The only question left today, is to see how many new world records will be set so stay tuned.

programme.title: SCL 2022 Season 8, Episode 2, Holland Part 1
programme.desc: We are here in Doetinchem – Holland, for Stage 2 and 3 in the hottest day of the year. 40-degree heat, these boys have to work harder than they ever have. The sun is going to be beating down, they're going to be sweating, hydration is going to be key today. I also reckon they're all going to be wearing their sunglasses. Let's see which shady looking character wins.

programme.title: SCL 2022 Season 8, Episode 3, Holland Part 2
programme.desc: So there you have it. The next day, 3 more events in 40 Degrees heat. We've got Gavin coming into day 2 leading the pack. Kelvin De Ruiter our world champion struggling a little bit at the moment, but Yoke Race, Conan's Wheel and then Stones to finish. There is a lot to be played for here, so stay tuned to see if Gavin can take the lead and beat Kelvin overall.

programme.title: SCL 2022 Season 8, Episode 4, Serbia Part 1
programme.desc: We're in the Serbian city of Novi kozarci, for the next stage in the world series. And what a fantastic line up we have for you again. But it is going to be one of the hottest stages yet. A Strongman competition in 44-degree heat. It will be a real challenge for these athletes to finish this event. From all over the world the strongmen came here for the title! Welcome to the heat hell in Serbia.

programme.title: SCL 2022 Season 8, Episode 5, Serbia Part 2
programme.desc: Welcome to day 2 in Serbia, and its another baking hot one. We are in Kikinda today! We've got three more gruelling events for our athletes. Sami Ahola is leading the pack, so can he be the first Finnish athlete to take an SCL title. Stay tuned to find out.

programme.title: SCL 2022 Season 8, Episode 6, Joensuu Part 1
programme.desc: In this competition, we have our athletes paired up. They're going to have to take on each event together, having to factor in each other's strengths and possibly weaknesses. Can the men who normally work alone, share their powers as a duo? Let's find out!

programme.title: SCL 2022 Season 8, Episode 7, Joensuu Part 2
programme.desc: Day 2 of the famous Team World championship here in Finland- Joensuu. Welcome to the final day of the world's strongest team event. The race to be the best team in the world is coming to its crowing point. All is still wide open for any of these to take the title. Who is going to win? Will team Latvia keep their World Title or maybe Finland can attach them? Keep watching and we'll find out.
